title: arnica griscomii subsp. frigida
intro: Arnica griscomii subsp. frigida, commonly known as frigid arnica, is a subspecies of the arnica plant, which is a perennial flowering plant native to high-altitude alpine meadows in North America. The medicinal properties of frigid arnica include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies. The health benefits of frigid arnica include reducing pain and swelling, promoting wound healing, and soothing skin irritations, making it a valuable asset for treating sprains, strains, and bruises. Frigid arnica is often used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures, salves, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
